scope: simplexml_load_string through the libxml-backed parser bridge
dom_import_simplexml over bounded SimpleXMLElement element/list storage
direct isset()/empty() over properties and offsets
bounded xpath() over strict XML elements and attributes
selected XML declarations, comments, CDATA, namespace declarations, and namespaced element names through libxml
WordPress-style RSS, plugin metadata, and config XML snippets
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime xml -- --nocapture
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_vm dom -- --nocapture
PHPT_REUSE_LAST=0 PHPT_DEV_REUSE_TARGET_PASS=0 nix develop -c just phpt-dev-module MODULE=simplexml
next_step: Broaden SimpleXML to libxml namespace semantics, full XPath grammar, and live DOM/SimpleXML identity after the DOM/XML backend is widened.
